zh.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville是Robert d'Estouteville II的兒子，於大約1040年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯。他於1056年住在法國諾門迪。他於1097年登記服兵役。他去世於1106年之後在英國越可爾可廷加姆，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville was born about 1040, in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France as the son of Robert d'Estouteville II. He lived in Normandy, France in 1056. He registered for military service in 1097. He died after 1106, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

historicEvents.description: Le nom de la localité est attesté sous les formes Walemunt (sans date) ou au XIIe siècle, Galemunt au XIIe siècle, Walemont en 1236, Walemont en 1262, Walemont en 1272, Vallemont en 1300, Valmont en 1385. Il s'agit d'une formation toponymique médiévale en -mont au sens de « colline, hauteur », appellatif précédé du nom de personne scandinave Váli (vieux danois Wale) que l'on rencontre dans plusieurs noms de lieux de Normandie

fr.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville est né environ 1040, à Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, fils de Robert d'Estouteville II. Il a vécu à Normandie, France en 1056. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1097. Il est décédé après 1106, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

Er hat sich 1097 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach 1106 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estoutevilleは約1040年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエストウテヴィレ-eカレスでRobert d'Estouteville IIの息子として生まれた。彼は1056年にはフランスノーマンディに住んでいた。彼は1097年に兵役登録をした。彼は1106年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントにて埋葬された。

ko.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스키p위스
ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville(은)는 대략 1040년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 에스토우테비레-e캘레스에서 Robert d'Estouteville II의 아들로 태어났다. 1056년도에 프랑스 노먼디에서 살았다. 그는 1097년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1106년 이후 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França filho de Robert d'Estouteville II. Ele viveu em Normandie, França em 1056. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1097. Ele faleceu após 1106, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: скипвит, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville родился около 1040 г. в местности эстоутевилле-eкаллесь, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. Его отца звали Robert d'Estouteville II. Он жил в местности норманди, Франция в 1056 году. В 1097 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после 1106 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.
